programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A couple wants to renovate their mid-century modern California ranch home; the project includes removing the front of the home to create an open-air vestibule; a surprising design choice sets the tone for one of the coolest kitchen makeovers ever.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A young family purchases a 1920s English cottage in Redlands, Calif., as their forever home; however, there is something funky with the living room, and they can't figure out what; Brett solves the mystery, removing all the 1970s additions.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1910 Arts and Crafts farmhouse for a family that relocates to Cherry Valley, Calif.; Brett opens up the original front porch, changes the layout in the living room and guts the kitchen to install some unique cabinetry.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett needs to update a 1902 Queen Anne Victorian house for a large family; previous residents made changes to the flow of the house.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.sub-title: Happy to Be Fancy and Fun
programme.desc: Gray and Grumpy take on a traditional 1920s home in Charleston, South Carolina; Gray is challenged to marry her fun, whimsical designs with the homeowners' more fancy, formal taste.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays enhance a 1903 Craftsman for a 98-year-old who has lived in the home since the 1950s; together they restore the main bedroom and kitchen to their former glory.

programme.title: Happy to Be Home
programme.sub-title: Happy to Be Fancy and Fun
programme.desc: Gray and Grumpy take on a traditional 1920s home in Charleston, South Carolina; Gray is challenged to marry her fun, whimsical designs with the homeowners' more fancy, formal taste.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley pick up a job half done, restoring bedrooms and a kitchen for a young family in an 1886 Victorian home in the historic Stocking District of Galveston.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays enhance a 1903 Craftsman for a 98-year-old who has lived in the home since the 1950s; together they restore the main bedroom and kitchen to their former glory.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley pick up a job half done, restoring bedrooms and a kitchen for a young family in an 1886 Victorian home in the historic Stocking District of Galveston.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1918 Dutch Colonial home in Upland, Calif.; it is the family's dream to finally see the house restored to its original glory; Brett quickly learns this house is a time capsule full of discoveries.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett helps a single mother with her Spanish bungalow in Riverside, Calif.; after a discovery causes him to change directions with his design plan, he opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A couple wants to renovate their mid-century modern California ranch home; the project includes removing the front of the home to create an open-air vestibule; a surprising design choice sets the tone for one of the coolest kitchen makeovers ever.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A young family purchases a 1920s English cottage in Redlands, Calif., as their forever home; however, there is something funky with the living room, and they can't figure out what; Brett solves the mystery, removing all the 1970s additions.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays enhance a 1903 Craftsman for a 98-year-old who has lived in the home since the 1950s; together they restore the main bedroom and kitchen to their former glory.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Real estate agent Diana and pharmaceutical industry representative Laith have traveled the world and now wish to settle down in a home on a lake; the tables are turned, as Diana will now be a buyer when she and Laith look at three unique properties.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple move from Oregon to Waco, Texas, and enlist Chip and Jo to transform their bland, outdated home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Jo return to their roots and work to give a home a clean, new look, until Jo decides she wants her sister and brother-in-law to buy the house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.sub-title: Big Budget for a Big House
programme.desc: A couple narrow down their search to three homes that would work for their family of five, and task Chip and Jo with determining which house has the most renovation potential for their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: After 17 years of working and living abroad in Pakistan, a couple returns home to Waco and enlists Chip and Jo to help renovate an 1890s farmhouse bought sight unseen; Chip and Jo implement the Moroccan and Scandinavian design styles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Bryce and Emily Sandvall want a new home for their family of five in the Woodway area that's not only right for their family but also has a traditional design style that they love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna work with the Aguilar family to find a forever home that fits their family of four and reflects their personal style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and repurposed a beach cottage on Nantucket Island, a formerly dilapidated motor lodge in downtown Raleigh, North Carolina, and a 1907 hospital in Washington, North Carolina.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Visionary owners walk us through their experiences repurposing an old motel in Sonora, California, a beach cottage in Virginia Beach, Virginia and an 1880s pickle factory in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Owners share the stories of a historic Tudor in Grove Hill, Mich., with a fresh take on its history, a peaceful beachfront build rooted in community in Fire Island, N.Y., and an open concept home inspired by the nature in Twentynine Palms, Calif.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Owners share the story of a 1918 pre-Craftsman filled with colorful maximalism in Minneapolis, MN, a family home away from city life tucked in the valley of Topanga, CA, and a beachside shack that honors the memory of a loved one in Hollywood Beach, CA.

programme.title: Back to the Frontier
programme.desc: As they settle into their homesteads, the Hanna-Riggs, the Lopers and the Halls face the harsh realities of life without modern conveniences.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Storytellers share how they found and repurposed a beach cottage on Nantucket Island, a formerly dilapidated motor lodge in downtown Raleigh, North Carolina, and a 1907 hospital in Washington, North Carolina.

programme.desc: Visionary owners walk us through their experiences repurposing an old motel in Sonora, California, a beach cottage in Virginia Beach, Virginia and an 1880s pickle factory in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Diane and Andre search for a private getaway for their family.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Kelly and Mark search for a dream vacation home for their now grown up family.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Busy mom Beth, with four young kids, is searching for an extra large and very private dream vacation property ideal for kids, and where her sister can visit comfortably.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: It's now or never for a couple to embrace their dream of having a home by the lake where they can retire.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Diane and Andre search for a private getaway for their family.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Kelly and Mark search for a dream vacation home for their now grown up family.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Busy mom Beth, with four young kids, is searching for an extra large and very private dream vacation property ideal for kids, and where her sister can visit comfortably.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: It's now or never for a couple to embrace their dream of having a home by the lake where they can retire.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Diane and Andre search for a private getaway for their family.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Kelly and Mark search for a dream vacation home for their now grown up family.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: Busy mom Beth, with four young kids, is searching for an extra large and very private dream vacation property ideal for kids, and where her sister can visit comfortably.

programme.title: What's for Sale
programme.desc: It's now or never for a couple to embrace their dream of having a home by the lake where they can retire.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to turn a tiny dilapidated 1940s-era clapboard house into a beach getaway for a small family to enjoy on the weekends.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Within the worn halls of an 1890s Victorian, a modernized Italian monastery, and an American Revolutionary era stone house, families around the world take the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to revive.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: From the shores of the Oregon Coast to the Washington wilderness and all the way to a Texas lake, visionary homeowners turn their home design dreams into reality with stunningly unique waterfront havens.

programme.title: Anything but Gray
programme.desc: Gray, Chelcie and Grumpy take on their tightest timeline yet; transforming a family's historic Charleston, S.C., home before their son's fourth birthday; from bold wallpapers to built-in bunks, this colorful makeover delivers just in time.
